titles.title: pangeo-fish: A Python package for studying fish movement using biologging and earth science data

citation.article_title: Seasonal migration, site fidelity, and population structure of European seabass (Dicentrarchus labrax)
citation.author: de Pontual
citation.unstructured_citation: de Pontual, H., Heerah, K., Goossens, J., Garren, F., Martin, S., Le Ru, L., Le Roy, D., & Woillez, M. (2023). Seasonal migration, site fidelity, and population structure of European seabass (Dicentrarchus labrax). ICES Journal of Marine Science, 80(6), 1606–1618. https://doi.org/10.1093/icesjms/fsad087

citation.article_title: A HMM-based model to geolocate pelagic fish from high-resolution individual temperature and depth histories: European sea bass as a case study
citation.author: Woillez
citation.unstructured_citation: Woillez, M., Fablet, R., Ngo, T.-T., Lalire, M., Lazure, P., & de Pontual, H. (2016). A HMM-based model to geolocate pelagic fish from high-resolution individual temperature and depth histories: European sea bass as a case study. Ecological Modelling, 321, 10–22. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ecolmodel.2015.10.024

citation.article_title: Acoustic and archival technologies join forces: A combination tag
citation.author: Goossens
citation.unstructured_citation: Goossens, J., Woillez, M., LeBris, A., Verhelst, P., Moens, T., Torreele, E., & Reubens, J. (2023). Acoustic and archival technologies join forces: A combination tag. Methods in Ecology and Evolution, 14(3), 860–866. https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.14045

citation.article_title: Sea temperature effects on depth use and habitat selection in a marine fish community
citation.author: Carla
citation.unstructured_citation: Carla, F., Villegas‐Ríos, D., Moland, E., & Olsen, E. (2021). Sea temperature effects on depth use and habitat selection in a marine fish community. Journal of Animal Ecology, 90. https://doi.org/10.1111/1365-2656.13497

citation.article_title: Short-term survival, space use and diel patterns of coastal fish species revealed from ’solo datasets’
citation.author: Mucientes
citation.journal_title: Marine and Freshwater Behaviour and Physiology
citation.unstructured_citation: Mucientes, G., Leeb, K., Straßer, F.-E., Villegas-Ríos, D., & Alonso-Fernández, A. (2021). Short-term survival, space use and diel patterns of coastal fish species revealed from ’solo datasets’. Marine and Freshwater Behaviour and Physiology, 54. https://doi.org/10.1080/10236244.2021.1912604

citation.article_title: Geolocation of North Sea cod (Gadus morhua) using hidden Markov models and behavioural switching
citation.author: Pedersen
citation.journal_title: Canadian Journal of Fisheries and Aquatic Sciences
citation.unstructured_citation: Pedersen, M. W., Righton, D., Thygesen, U. H., Andersen, K. H., & Madsen, H. (2008). Geolocation of North Sea cod (Gadus morhua) using hidden Markov models and behavioural switching. Canadian Journal of Fisheries and Aquatic Sciences, 65(11), 2367–2377. https://doi.org/10.1038/42622

citation.article_title: Thermal niche of Atlantic cod Gadus morhua: limits, tolerance and optima
citation.author: Righton
citation.unstructured_citation: Righton, D. A., Andersen, K. H., Neat, F., Thorsteinsson, V., Steingrund, P., Svedäng, H., Michalsen, K., Hinrichsen, H.-H., Bendall, V., Neuenfeldt, S., & others. (2010). Thermal niche of Atlantic cod Gadus morhua: limits, tolerance and optima. Marine Ecology Progress Series, 420, 1–13. https://doi.org/10.3354/meps08889

citation.article_title: Coupling spectral analysis and hidden Markov models for the segmentation of behavioural patterns
citation.author: Heerah
citation.unstructured_citation: Heerah, K., Woillez, M., Fablet, R., Garren, F., Martin, S., & De Pontual, H. (2017). Coupling spectral analysis and hidden Markov models for the segmentation of behavioural patterns. Movement Ecology, 5, 1–15. https://doi.org/10.1186/s40462-017-0111-3
